description: Per-intent fixture set for the 4 PII-sensitive intents shipped in Phase B (2026-07-13): real_estate_rental / recruit_hiring / payment_qr / id_document. 5 fixtures each = 20 total. Standard 20-fixture size. Hand-curated from `profiling/scan_intents.py`'s top-5 per cluster by confidence. Expected actions mirror the consent-gated ActionDef shipped in the same Phase B commit. Notes: (a) `payment_qr` is sparse — only 49 RCTW images match the strict scan regex, so 4 of 5 fixtures are boundary cases (one is literally an Alipay screenshot). (b) `id_document` includes the only real 居民身份证 card in RCTW (image_170) — that's the hardest case; redact_id chip should propose there but we land on Toast, no auto-side-effect. (c) `recruit_hiring` has overlap with phone (some classified-ads fixtures have phone + hiring keywords); the phone_20 / pii20 sets don't overlap, but the LLM may emit BOTH action_ids on cross-fixtures.
